data.name: Lust Academy Final
data.detailed_description:
Two New Demos Await You


Wishlist Our Next Game "LA: Streets of Sorcery"


關於此遊戲

Welcome to Lust Academy Season Final, where the heat is turned up and the adventure and the flames of passion reach new levels of intensity! Building on the tantalizing twists and turns of previous seasons, this journey promises to be juicier and hotter than ever before.

WHAT TO EXPECT:

A FIERY NEW ADVENTURE

You’ve navigated the early years of your magical journey, and now, you’re at the epicenter of a thrilling new journey. With deepened friendships and connections made — some more intimate than others—you’ll rely on those as the academy faces its greatest peril.

Building on past encounters and the tantalizing twists you’ve experienced, prepare for even steamier relationships and daring turns ahead. Get ready to dive into a world where every decision sizzles with consequences. The excitement is just beginning!

SIZZLE WITH POWERFUL ALLIES

With dark forces on the rise, you’ll need to forge powerful alliances with mythical beings, from enigmatic dragons to celestial angels. Every decision will shape the future of your world, and your diplomatic skills—and charisma, if you know what we mean—will be crucial in determining its fate. The balance of power is in your hands, and the destiny of the realm hangs on the choices you make!

STRENGTHEN THE ACADEMY

Prepare Magic Academy for the looming conflict. Fortify its defenses, rally the students, and enhance its magical wards to withstand the coming storm. Your leadership will determine the academy's survival—but don't forget to indulge in the pleasures along the way. After all, even in the face of danger, there's always time for a bit of fun!

UNCOVER SECRETS AND FACE NEW CHALLENGES

Delve deeper into the dark forces' plans and uncover their weaknesses. 
The path will be fraught with difficult choices and moral dilemmas.

EVOLVING RELATIONSHIPS

Your journey isn't just about battle—it's also about building and deepening relationships. Engage in more complex interactions and explore new facets of your character’s romantic and erotic experiences. Whether you're reconnecting with old friends or forming new bonds, your choices bring both pleasure and the power to shape your story.

ENHANCED GAMEPLAY EXPERIENCE

Enjoy new gameplay mechanics и более глубокие персонажи that offer greater depth and variety. The expanded quest system and sandbox, making your adventure more engaging and immersive than ever before.

Will you rise to the challenge and lead the Academy to victory without forgetting about pleasure? Can you uncover the secrets needed to thwart the darkness's ambitions? The fate of the academy—and the world—depends on your courage and cunning and your sex activities.

Are you prepared to face the darkness and protect what you cherish?

Join us in Lust Academy Final and continue the adventure!

data.short_description: Lust Academy Final offers a thrilling mix of magic and adult fantasies. Strengthen the academy, build alliances, and explore steamy relationships while battling dark forces. Face intense challenges and make crucial choices in this captivating adventure.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

data.legal_notice:
Legal Disclaimers:
All characters are 18 age or older

This game contains violence, obscene scenes (naked girls and flirting scenes with sexual overtones, sex scenes), Rude humor, blood, scenes that depict smoking, or infrequent use of profanity.
All sexual acts in the game are consensual.

  • Processor: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GPU capable of showing images
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX® 9 compatible
